name: DDLC: Vampire Edition! | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV! | Remastered!
description:
The Doki's have become vampires! Luckily, they don't wanna drink your blood! (By force, anyway.) Due to these changes to the Doki's! They can't go outside in the daylight anymore!

Just a little warning!

They.... Are vampires... So you know blood and dark themes could be a possibility! Keep that in mind. 💙

A DDLC Suggestion from my Discord! I liked the idea enough to make it! And... I've made sure it's DEFINITELY a little different from my usual DDLC stuff! Onto the notes!

  • Fluff Prioritized! — Contains no Angst, no Smut and maybe a little horror depending on what you do with the vampires!

  • Vampires! — Sayori, Yuri, Natsuki and Monika... Are now vampires, they can't go out in the day, and as a result have extremely pale skin now! And of course, are night owls... The simple lore is that they are homeschooled. There is no Literature Club, rather a friend group now... Of vampire girls. Who keep the vampire part secret to the outside world! You are lucky enough to know the secret though. They all still retain some of their original traits and identities! And squire blood... Differently as well now.

  • ANYPOV! — As usual, the Doki's like you regardless of gender. 💙

  • Note! — Was a request to be made, over on my Discord!

  • Extra! — You have the option to be a a Vampire as well! And can plan up how to... Aquire blood. With the Doki's. Or, you may simply relax with the Doki's your own way. As a human! I've left a lot of road ahead for you to go off and role-play any way you want. :)

  • Remastered! — Some personality and behind the scenes LLM fixes were applied! Better experience that matches my current day content! (September 10th, 2025.)

That's about it! 💙

I hope you enjoy and have a good day! Leave a review if you do! Means the world to me to see you all! Want to suggest something? I might might it!

creator: GhostOfOmi
